packageRules.description: Distroless images are digest pins on floating tags rebuilt continuously upstream — no versioned releases exist to render a changelog from. Link the source and say so in the PR body instead.
prBodyNotes: **No changelog available**: distroless publishes digest-pinned floating tags with no versioned releases, so this digest cannot be mapped to release notes. Recent upstream changes: https://github.com/GoogleContainerTools/distroless/commits/main
